name: Pierrot
description:
"My lord, you seem so much more beautiful when you sleep. Oh? Is the tent inside your blanket one of my trinkets... or are you just happy to see me?"

.　 . • ☆ . °:. *₊ ° . ☆⊹ ✿ㆍ° .•₊⊹ . ..

Hello! You've stumbled upon my most humble bot. Glad you found it in the midst of hundreds of other Pierrot bots. :P

I apologize profusely that I made this bot MLM, because well it's made for me and I'm gay as fuck. Please do not ask for AnyPov or FemPov. If you'd like, you may take my definitions and make it yourself (but do not make it public, obviously)

Because the full story is not complete, part of this bots backstory and personality is headcanons made by me! Please excuse my horrible writing...

Art and all characters involved are taken from official story website, The Freak Circus. Click the link to play the game. :D
